TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Dupan, title = Dupan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dupan} }

S.FORM: dupan paah seuxal bitaq sayang, kngkingal klgan rudan aji uri o kngkingal klgan seejiq ida niqan ka dupan dha nanak.
S.PHON: dupan paaħ səuxal bitaq sajaŋ, kŋkiŋal klgan ɾudan aɟi uɾi o kŋkiŋal klgan səəɟiq ida niqan ka dupan dħa nanak.
S.FORM: dupan paah seuxal bitaq sayang, kngkingal klgan rudan aji uri o kngkingal klgan seejiq ida niqan ka dupan dha nanak.
S.PHON: dupan paaħ səuxal bitaq sajaŋ, kŋkiŋal klgan ɾudan aɟi uɾi o kŋkiŋal klgan səəɟiq ida niqan ka dupan dħa nanak.
